verb.frequency: Oxford English Corpus 빈도 상위 (상태 유지 동사 대표)

meanings.example: We must keep the data confidential.
meanings.exampleKo: 그 데이터는 반드시 기밀로 유지해야 합니다.

meanings.example: We keep all KYC records for 5 years.
He kept asking for more documents.

chunks.example: We keep track of all suspicious activity reports.
Keep in mind the new threshold rules.
It's hard to keep up with FATF updates.
We keep records of all customer due diligence.
I'll keep you informed of any updates on the case.

pronTip.title: KEEP 동사 발음 핵심
points: keep [킵] — 긴 'ee' 소리, p 살짝 끊기

listening.title: AML 기록 관리 시나리오
listening.source: AML 업무 + Cambridge Dictionary 청크 검증
listening.fullText: Manager: Are we keeping records of all the new high-risk merchants? Staff: Yes. We keep track of every alert in the system. Manager: Good. Keep in mind the new retention rules. Staff: I will. It's hard to keep up with all the regulatory changes. Manager: Just keep me informed of any updates. Staff: Will do. We're keeping the documentation organized.

blanks.prefix: Staff: I will. It's hard to

examples5.label: 유지
examples5.en: Please keep the meeting room organized after use.
examples5.ko: 사용 후 회의실을 정리된 상태로 유지해주세요.

examples5.label: 보관
examples5.en: We keep all CDD records for at least 5 years.

examples5.label: 추적
examples5.en: We keep track of every flagged merchant in our system.

examples5.label: 유의 사항
examples5.en: Keep in mind the merchant's past escalation history.
examples5.ko: 가맹점의 과거 에스컬레이션 이력을 염두에 두세요.

examples5.label: 보고 유지
examples5.en: Please keep me informed of any developments on this case.
examples5.ko: 이 케이스에 대한 어떤 진전이든 계속 보고해주세요.

writing5.ko: 그 데이터는 반드시 기밀로 유지해야 합니다.
writing5.en: We must keep the data confidential.
We keep all KYC records for 5 years.
We keep track of all suspicious activity reports.
It's hard to keep up with FATF updates.

writing5.ko: 케이스에 대한 어떤 업데이트든 계속 알려드릴게요.
writing5.en: I'll keep you informed of any updates on the case.

challenge3sec.en: It's hard to keep up with the latest trends.

freewrite.situation: 본인 회사의 AML 기록 보관 정책과 본인이 어떻게 최신 규정을 따라가는지 영어로 설명하세요. 무엇을 보관하고, 어떻게 추적하고, 어떻게 업데이트를 받아오는지 KEEP 동사 + 오늘 배운 청크를 사용해서 3-5문장으로 작성해보세요.
freewrite.hint: 활용: keep track of, keep in mind, keep up with, keep records of, keep someone informed
freewrite.placeholder: 예: Our team keeps records of all customer due diligence for at least 5 years per Korean regulation. We keep track of regulatory updates through several channels...

office.info:
🏢 사내 미팅
기록 관리, 진행 보고, 업데이트 공유 — KEEP 동사가 유지·지속의 핵심!

dialog.text: Could you keep me informed on this case?
Of course. I'll keep you posted daily.
Thanks. Keep up the good work.
Where do we keep the audit logs?
We keep them in the secure folder for 5 years.
Good. Keep that organized — we'll need it for the audit.
How are we keeping up with the new FATF requirements?
We've kept track of all the changes since January.
Are we keeping records of every implementation step?
Yes. We keep a change log and every team lead is kept informed.
Good. Keep in mind the audit committee meets in two weeks.
I'll keep the documentation ready and keep the team aligned.

rolePlay.scenario: 본부장에게 신규 FATF 요구사항 대응 현황을 보고하세요. 무엇을 추적하고, 어떻게 기록을 관리하고, 누가 업데이트를 받는지 KEEP 동사로 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: I want to make sure we're keeping up with the FATF changes. Walk me through what your team is keeping track of, who's keeping the leadership informed, and what we're keeping in mind for the audit committee.

email.info:
📧 이메일·메시지
업데이트 약속, 자료 보관 안내, 유의 사항 — 격식 갖춘 KEEP 동사 활용!

dialog.text: Hi, I'll keep you informed as the case progresses.
Thanks. Please keep me copied on key updates.
Will do. I'll keep the loop tight.
How long do you keep KYC records?
We keep records of all KYC for 5 years minimum.
Good to know. Keep that policy clear in our agreement.
Hi, our team needs to know how long you keep our merchant data.
Thanks for asking. We keep records of CDD for 5 years per Korean AML law.
Could you keep us informed if the retention period changes?
Of course. Please keep in mind that some categories may have longer retention requirements.
Understood. How do you keep track of regulatory updates?
We keep a regulatory change log. The legal team keeps everyone informed via monthly updates.
Helpful. Please keep us on the distribution list.

rolePlay.scenario: 외국 가맹점이 데이터 보관 정책과 규정 업데이트 공유 절차에 대해 문의했습니다. 보관 기간, 추적 방법, 업데이트 채널을 KEEP 동사로 정중하게 안내하세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Privacy Officer at an international merchant
rolePlay.aiOpening: Hi, our team is reviewing data retention with all our PG partners. Could you let us know how long you keep records of our merchant data, how you keep track of regulatory changes, and how you keep partners informed of updates?

aml.info:
🚨 AML 실무
기록 보관, 알람 추적, 규제 동향 — KEEP 동사 핵심 활용!

dialog.text: Are you keeping records of every alert?
Yes, we keep track of everything in the case management system.
Good. Keep in mind the 5-year retention requirement.
How do you keep up with new typologies?
I keep an eye on FATF reports and ACAMS bulletins.
Good. Keep me informed of anything significant.
How does your team keep records of suspicious activity?
We keep records of every alert, including ones that don't result in filing.
How long do you keep them?
Five years from the alert date, in line with regulation. Keep in mind some PEP-linked records are kept indefinitely.
How do you keep up with regulatory changes?
We keep a change log. The compliance team keeps senior leadership informed monthly.
Do you keep track of who accessed each record?
Yes, we keep a full access log for every record. It's reviewed quarterly.

rolePlay.scenario: FIU 검사관이 본인 팀의 기록 보관 및 규제 추적 체계에 대해 인터뷰를 진행합니다. 무엇을 보관하고, 얼마나 보관하고, 어떻게 추적하고, 누가 업데이트를 받는지 KEEP 동사로 답변하세요.
rolePlay.aiOpening: Today's focus is record-keeping and regulatory awareness. Walk me through what you keep track of, how long you keep records, and how your team keeps up with regulatory changes. I'll also want to know who you keep informed and how often.

social.info:
🌍 비즈니스 사교
업계 트렌드, 연락 유지, 학습 동향 — 부드러운 KEEP 동사!

dialog.text: Let's keep in touch after the conference.
Definitely. I'll keep you posted on Korean AML updates.
Same here. Keep doing great work!
How do you keep up with industry trends?
I keep track of ACAMS articles and FATF bulletins.
Smart. I should keep that habit too.
How does Korea keep records of cross-border transactions?
We keep records for 5 years minimum. Keep in mind we also keep an audit trail of every access.
Do you keep informed of changes in counterparty jurisdictions too?
We do. We keep a watchlist that's updated weekly.
How do you keep up with sanctions list changes?
Automated feed plus a daily review. Hard to keep up otherwise — too many lists, too many updates.

rolePlay.scenario: ACAMS 컨퍼런스에서 다른 나라 컴플라이언스 동료와 각국의 기록 보관·동향 추적 방식을 비교 토론하세요. 본인 회사가 무엇을 추적하고, 어떻게 따라가고, 누구와 정보를 공유하는지 KEEP 동사로 자연스럽게 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Lukas, AML Lead at a German payments firm
rolePlay.aiOpening: I'd love to keep in touch after the conference. Quick question — how does your team keep up with sanctions list changes and keep records of cross-border activity? We're rebuilding our process and could learn from your approach.

daily.info:
😊 일상 응용
건강 유지, 약속, 가족 — 가장 친숙한 KEEP 동사 패턴!

dialog.text: How do you keep yourself active?
I try to keep walking every morning.
Nice. Keep it up!
Don't forget — dinner at 7.
I'll keep that in mind.
Keep me posted if anything changes.
How do you keep up with everything — work, baby, your own life?
Honestly, I just keep a tight schedule. I keep track of everything in one app.
Do you keep time for yourself?
Trying to. I keep Sunday mornings free for reading or just being alone.
Smart. Keep that habit — it really matters.
I'll keep you informed if I find more tricks!

rolePlay.scenario: 친구와 카페에서 만나 일·육아·자기 돌봄의 균형을 유지하는 방법에 대해 솔직하게 대화하세요. 무엇을 추적하고, 무엇을 명심하고, 어떻게 따라가는지 KEEP 동사로 자연스럽게 풀어내세요.
rolePlay.aiRole: Hye-jin, a close friend juggling similar life demands
rolePlay.aiOpening: Honestly, how do you keep it all together? I'm struggling to keep up with everything lately. Any tricks to keep yourself sane that I should keep in mind?
